languages.text: "Так подойди поближе и отведай его! Или боишься обжечься?" {n}Ваше оружие искрит и отскакивает, не в силах пробить странный экран. Саргона бросает быстрый взгляд на один из генераторов в стороне, будто проверяя его сохранность.{/n}

"Then come closer and have a taste! Or are you afraid of getting burnt?" {n}Your weapon sparks and bounces off, unable to penetrate the strange screen. Sargona casts a quick glance at one of the generators off to the side, as if checking that it is still intact.{/n}

{n}You bring your weapon to bear, and Sargona's shoulder explodes in a splatter of red.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Acércate y ven por él! ¿O te da miedo quemarte?». {n}Tu arma rebota con un estallido de chispas, incapaz de atravesar la extraña pantalla. Sargona mira de soslayo uno de los generadores que hay a un lado, como si quisiera comprobar que sigue intacto.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then come closer and have a taste! Or are you afraid of getting burnt?" {n}Your weapon sparks and bounces off, unable to penetrate the strange screen. Sargona casts a quick glance at one of the generators off to the side, as if checking that it is still intact.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Acércate y ven por él! ¿O te da miedo quemarte?». {n}Tu arma rebota con un estallido de chispas, incapaz de atravesar la extraña pantalla. Sargona mira de soslayo uno de los generadores que hay a un lado, como si quisiera comprobar que sigue intacto.{/n}

languages.text: “不如你亲自过来尝尝吧！还是说，你害怕被烧成焦炭？”{n}你的武器火花迸射，反弹回来，完全无法穿破古怪的屏障。萨戈纳瞥了一眼旁边的发电机，似乎在检查发电机是否完好无损。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then come closer and have a taste! Or are you afraid of getting burnt?" {n}Your weapon sparks and bounces off, unable to penetrate the strange screen. Sargona casts a quick glance at one of the generators off to the side, as if checking that it is still intact.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “不如你亲自过来尝尝吧！还是说，你害怕被烧成焦炭？”{n}你的武器火花迸射，反弹回来，完全无法穿破古怪的屏障。萨戈纳瞥了一眼旁边的发电机，似乎在检查发电机是否完好无损。{/n}
“再打那玩意儿一下，你自己就要变成雷卡咖啡了！”{n}你的武器火花迸射，反弹回来，完全无法穿破古怪的屏障。萨戈纳瞥了一眼旁边的发电机，似乎在检查发电机是否完好无损。{/n}

languages.text: « Alors, approchez ! Venez voir de plus près ! À moins que vous ayez peur des brûlures ? » {n}Votre arme rebondit dans une gerbe d'étincelles, incapable de pénétrer l'étrange écran. Sargona lance un rapide coup d'œil à l'un des générateurs sur le côté, comme pour vérifier qu'il est toujours intact.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then come closer and have a taste! Or are you afraid of getting burnt?" {n}Your weapon sparks and bounces off, unable to penetrate the strange screen. Sargona casts a quick glance at one of the generators off to the side, as if checking that it is still intact.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Alors, approchez ! Venez voir de plus près ! À moins que vous ayez peur des brûlures ? » {n}Votre arme rebondit dans une gerbe d'étincelles, incapable de pénétrer l'étrange écran. Sargona lance un rapide coup d'œil à l'un des générateurs sur le côté, comme pour vérifier qu'il est toujours intact.{/n}

languages.text: 「ならば近くに来て味わってみろ！それとも、焼かれるのが怖いのか？」{n}あなたの武器は火花を散らしながら跳ね返され、その奇妙なスクリーンを貫通することができなかった。サルゴナは横にある発生装置のひとつに素早く視線を向け、まだ無事かどうかを確かめるかのような様子を見せた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then come closer and have a taste! Or are you afraid of getting burnt?" {n}Your weapon sparks and bounces off, unable to penetrate the strange screen. Sargona casts a quick glance at one of the generators off to the side, as if checking that it is still intact.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ならば近くに来て味わってみろ！それとも、焼かれるのが怖いのか？」{n}あなたの武器は火花を散らしながら跳ね返され、その奇妙なスクリーンを貫通することができなかった。サルゴナは横にある発生装置のひとつに素早く視線を向け、まだ無事かどうかを確かめるかのような様子を見せた。{/n}

languages.text: "Öyleyse yaklaş da tadına bak! Yoksa yanmaktan mı korkuyorsun?" {n}Silahın kıvılcımlar saçıp sekiyor, tuhaf ekrana nüfuz edemiyor. Sargona, sanki hâlâ sağlam olup olmadığını kontrol ediyormuş gibi yan taraftaki jeneratörlerden birine hızla göz atıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then come closer and have a taste! Or are you afraid of getting burnt?" {n}Your weapon sparks and bounces off, unable to penetrate the strange screen. Sargona casts a quick glance at one of the generators off to the side, as if checking that it is still intact.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Öyleyse yaklaş da tadına bak! Yoksa yanmaktan mı korkuyorsun?" {n}Silahın kıvılcımlar saçıp sekiyor, tuhaf ekrana nüfuz edemiyor. Sargona, sanki hâlâ sağlam olup olmadığını kontrol ediyormuş gibi yan taraftaki jeneratörlerden birine hızla göz atıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Dann tretet näher und probiert davon! Oder habt Ihr Angst, Euch zu verbrennen?" {n}Deine Waffe schlägt Funken und prallt ab – sie kann den merkwürdigen Schirm nicht durchdringen. Sargona wirft einen kurzen Blick auf einen der Generatoren an der Seite, als wolle er überprüfen, ob er noch intakt ist.{/n}
